response.justification: The candidate is an accomplished full-stack software developer with strong web, backend, and some embedded/low-latency experience, but the role requires deep specialization in SoC/IP modeling, AI-accelerator hardware-software co-design, and deep-learning workload optimization. None of these core competencies appear in the resume, and there is no GPU/SIMD/MIMD architecture or DNN training-inference optimization background. The skill and domain mismatch is fundamental rather than incidental.
strengths: Long, varied software engineering career across many domains
Some low-latency systems and C/C++ embedded exposure
Strong testing, TDD, and software craftsmanship discipline
concerns: No SoC/IP modeling or AI-accelerator hardware experience
No GPU architecture or deep-learning optimization background
Background is application software, not performance/HW co-design
